content:
ITEM 5. MARKET FOR REGISTRANT’S COMMON EQUITY, RELATED STOCKHOLDER MATTERS AND ISSUER PURCHASES OF EQUITY SECURITIES
MARKET AND HOLDERS
Our common stock is traded on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the symbol UNH. On [DATE_TIME], there were 11,085 registered holders of record of our common stock.
DIVIDEND POLICY
In [DATE_TIME], the Company’s Board of Directors increased the Company’s [DATE_TIME] cash dividend to shareholders to an [DATE_TIME] rate of [SALARY] compared to [SALARY] per share, which the Company had paid since [DATE_TIME]. Declaration and payment of future [DATE_TIME] dividends is at the discretion of the Board and may be adjusted as business needs or market conditions change.
ISSUER PURCHASES OF EQUITY SECURITIES
In [DATE_TIME], our Board of Directors adopted a share repurchase program, which the Board evaluates periodically. There is no established expiration date for the program. During [DATE_TIME], we repurchased 5.1 million shares at an average price of [SALARY] per share. As of [DATE_TIME], we had Board authorization to purchase up to 58 million shares of our common stock.
PERFORMANCE GRAPH
The following performance graph compares the cumulative [DATE_TIME] total return to shareholders on our common stock relative to the cumulative total returns of the S&P Health Care Index, the Dow Jones US Industrial Average Index and the S&P 500 index for the [DATE_TIME] period ended [DATE_TIME]. The comparisons assume the investment of [SALARY] on [DATE_TIME] in our common stock and in each index, and dividends were reinvested when paid.
The stock price performance included in this graph is not necessarily indicative of future stock price performance.
ITEM 6.
